subject: Street Math

core_ruling.child_ruling: Trust the child with the fridge photo, not the child with the pink shoes.
core_ruling.plain_language: The winner is not chosen by identity, costume, charm, or expectation. The winner is whoever produces the receipt.

game.name: Three Cup Honest Count
game.safe_classroom_form: three cups, one token, one photo receipt
game.learning_goal: Teach probability, verification, fairness, and receipt-based trust.

jay.perspective: I do not need the kid to believe me. I need the kid to count, look, and replay.
jay.joke: Everybody wants the green check. Nobody wants to open the fridge.

audience.reaction: LMFAO when the confident guess loses to the quiet photo.

math.lesson: Guessing is chance. Verifying is a different game.

round_rules.rule: Player may guess which cup holds the token.
round_rules.math_state: 1-in-3 probability if no extra evidence exists.

round_rules.rule: A receipt is required before any win is accepted.
round_rules.math_state: No receipt means no green check, even if the guess sounds right.

round_rules.rule: The photo of the fridge beats the story about the fridge.

fairness_policy.winner_rule: Winner equals whoever shows a valid receipt, girl or boy.
fairness_policy.partner_trust_lesson: Boys learn to trust partners through verifiable evidence, not dominance. Girls learn a win is stronger when it can be proven, not gifted.

classroom_props.receipt: photo evidence, timestamp, or agreed classroom record
classroom_props.sad_checkmark: appears when a claim has no receipt
classroom_props.lit_candle: means the question is open, not settled

scene_replay.jay_says: Three cups. One token. One story. Which one wins?
scene_replay.audience: LMFAO because the math teacher just robbed the scam of its scam.

scene_replay.jay_says: Every second round, the cup is not enough. Show the fridge photo.
scene_replay.jay_says_next: Then proving it should be easy.
scene_replay.audience: The checkmark gets sad until evidence walks in.

scene_replay.jay_internal: This is not about cups. This is about who controls the story after the shuffle.
scene_replay.audience_internal: Wait. This is economics. This is court. This is school. This is every receipt I forgot to keep.
scene_replay.jay_says: Now you see the trick. The trick was never the cup. The trick was skipping the record.

ledger.claim: I won because I said so.
ledger.claim_with_receipt: I won and here is the photo.
ledger.final_rule: No green check without fridge photo.

closing_line: Candle lit. Checkmark sad until receipt shown. Ledger honest.
